references.key: for example use search product a but not search product a product b product c
references.raw: Product Search: Search the product with the detailed description one by one. For example, use “search[Product A]” but not “search[Product A, Product B, Product C]”.
references.title: For example, use “search[Product A]” but not “search[Product A, Product B, Product C]”
